creator: ltning-freebsd@anduin.net
text:
Created attachment 217799
archivers/rpm4 build log

Building rpm4 package using poudriere fails with ~66 failures of the following kind.

Port configuration has all boxes ticketd; DOCS NLS PLUGINS and PYTHON. Various combinations of these make no discernible difference. Full build log attached.

===>  Building package for rpm4-4.15.1_2
pkg-static: Unable to access file /wrkdirs/usr/ports/archivers/rpm4/work/stage/usr/local/lib/rpm/platform/aarch64-freebsd/macros:No such file or directory
pkg-static: Unable to access file /wrkdirs/usr/ports/archivers/rpm4/work/stage/usr/local/lib/rpm/platform/alpha-freebsd/macros:No such file or directory

pkg-static: Unable to access file /wrkdirs/usr/ports/archivers/rpm4/work/stage/usr/local/lib/rpm/platform/alphaev56-freebsd/macros:No such file or directory
